title: Food Delivery Platform
description: A two-sided food delivery platform with live order tracking, rider dispatch, and restaurant analytics.
longDescription: Built a full delivery marketplace connecting restaurants, riders, and customers. Customers order and track deliveries in real time on a Flutter app, restaurants manage menus and orders from a web dashboard, and a Node.js backend handles order routing, payments, and rider dispatch based on proximity and load.
features: Real-time order tracking with live map updates
Automated rider dispatch based on proximity and load
Restaurant dashboard with menu and order analytics
Integrated payments with Stripe and cash-on-delivery

title: Healthcare App
description: Telehealth app enabling appointment booking, video consultations, and e-prescriptions.
longDescription: Designed and built a HIPAA-conscious telehealth platform allowing patients to book appointments, join video consultations, and receive digital prescriptions. Doctors get a scheduling dashboard and patient history view, with encrypted storage for sensitive medical records.

title: AI Chat Assistant
description: A support chatbot with retrieval-augmented answers grounded in a company's own documentation.
longDescription: Built a RAG-powered chat assistant that ingests a company's docs, help center, and past support tickets into a vector database, then answers customer questions with cited sources. Includes a human handoff flow and an admin dashboard for reviewing conversation quality.
features: Retrieval-augmented answers grounded in real documentation
Source citations on every AI response
Human handoff when the assistant is uncertain

title: Inventory Management
description: Multi-warehouse inventory system with barcode scanning and low-stock alerts.
longDescription: Developed an inventory management system for a distributor operating across multiple warehouses. Staff scan barcodes to receive and pick stock, managers get low-stock alerts and demand forecasts, and finance exports reconciled reports each month.
features: Barcode scanning for receiving and picking

title: CRM System
description: A lightweight CRM for sales teams with pipeline tracking and email automation.
longDescription: Built a CRM tailored to a small sales team's workflow — pipeline stages, deal tracking, and automated follow-up emails, replacing a patchwork of spreadsheets. Includes reporting on conversion rates by stage and rep.
features: Conversion reporting by stage and rep
Role-based access for managers and reps

title: FinTech Dashboard
description: A real-time financial dashboard aggregating multi-currency transactions and spend analytics.
longDescription: Built a dashboard for a fintech client to visualize multi-currency transaction volume, merchant settlement status, and spend analytics in real time, backed by a Node.js service that streams and aggregates transaction events.
features: Custom spend analytics and exportable reports
Role-based dashboards for finance and support teams

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A headless storefront with custom checkout, promotions engine, and vendor payouts.
longDescription: Built a headless e-commerce storefront on Next.js with a Laravel commerce backend, supporting a custom promotions engine, multi-vendor payouts, and an optimized checkout flow that improved conversion over the client's previous platform.
features: Headless storefront with server-rendered product pages

title: Booking System
description: Appointment and resource booking system with calendar sync and automated reminders.
longDescription: Developed a booking system for a services business, syncing availability across staff calendars, handling deposits at booking time, and sending automated SMS/email reminders to reduce no-shows.
features: Deposit collection at time of booking
